intended_use: The Vivio® System is indicated to non-invasively estimate left ventricular end-diastolic pressure (LVEDP) is above or below 18mmHg. This measurement can aid in the diagnosis of heart failure when used
intended_use_full: The Vivio® System is indicated to non-invasively estimate left ventricular end-diastolic pressure (LVEDP) is above or below 18mmHg. This measurement can aid in the diagnosis of heart failure when used by qualified healthcare professionals as an adjunct alongside other clinically relevant information. For use in adults only.
ground_truth: Gold-standard invasive LVEDP obtained via Millar Mikro-Cath in catheterization laboratory cohort; reference-standard non-invasive echocardiographic indices in aged healthy cohort
